_comment: Example event levels (calendar-legend categories). Copy to event-levels.json. name is Croatian (hr). color = hex (legend dot). order = legend display order. These are referenced by events via their level name (importer resolves name → id).

eventLevels.name: Svjetski kup
eventLevels._notes: name = the Croatian label; color = #RRGGBB hex; order = where it sits in the legend.
